subcodes.first_line: O lovers of the Beauty of Truth! His honour Munír hath offered the utmost praise of you, that this enraptured company [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشقان جمال حق جناب منیر نهایت ستایشرا از شما نمودند که این جمع مفتون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
